sentences.spanish: Di que Carlos Slim posee varios negocios en México y Latinoamérica, ¿verdad?
sentences.english: Carlos Slim owns several businesses in México and Latin America, doesn’t he?

sentences.spanish: Di que los padres deben fomentar la lectura en sus hijos, ¿o no?
sentences.english: Parents must foster reading in their children, mustn’t they?

sentences.spanish: Di que ese collar abarata ese hermoso vestido, ¿O no?
sentences.english: That necklace cheapens that beautiful dress, doesn’t it?

sentences.spanish: Di que hay una creencia generalizada en el mundo que los milenials no tienen un verdadero compromiso para el trabajo, ¿no es así?
sentences.english: There´s a widspread belief that Milenials don’t have a true commitment with work, isn’t there?

sentences.spanish: Di que la casa de ellos tiene un jardín grande, ¿verdad?
sentences.english: Their house has a big garden, doesn’t it?

sentences.spanish: Di que Luis dijo rotundamente que él no nos ayudará con esto. ¿verdad?
sentences.english: Luis said outright that he won’t help us with this, didn’t he?

sentences.spanish: Di que prefiere pollo en lugar de cerdo, ¿verdad?
sentences.english: It prefers chicken instead of pork, doesn’t it?

sentences.spanish: Di que las películas de superhéroes le agradan a la mayoría de la gente, ¿no es verdad?
sentences.english: Superheroe movies appeal to most of people, don’t they?

sentences.spanish: Di esta conferencia fue tan inspiradora, ¿O no?
sentences.english: That conference was so uplifting, wasn’t it?

sentences.spanish: Di que la mayoría de la gente no fomenta valores en casa. ¿o si?
sentences.english: Most people don’t foster values at home, do they?

sentences.spanish: Di que nada va a detenernos ahora.
sentences.english: Nothing is going to stop us now.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo si va a venir después del trabajo.
sentences.english: Are you going to come after work?

sentences.spanish: Di que vas a pasear al perro.
sentences.english: I am going to walk the dog.

sentences.spanish: Pregúnta si vamos a tener junta esta tarde.
sentences.english: Are we going to have a meeting this afternoon?

sentences.spanish: Di que ella nunca va al cine sóla.
sentences.english: She never goes to the movies alone.

sentences.spanish: Di que tu mamá te va a matar.
sentences.english: My mom is going to kill me.

sentences.spanish: Di que nunca vas a olvidar esto.
sentences.english: I am never going to forget this.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si México va a ganar la copa del mundo en el 2020.
sentences.english: Is mexico going to win the world cup in the 2020?

sentences.spanish: Di que tu primo va a ganar mucho dinero con su nuevo negocio.
sentences.english: My cousin is going to win a lot of money with his new business.

sentences.spanish: Di que irás al supermercado esta noche.
sentences.english: I will go to the supermarket tonight.

sentences.spanish: Di que vas a escribir tus reportes más tarde.
sentences.english: I am going to write my reports later.

sentences.spanish: Di que Shakira y Maluma van a grabar un nuevo disco juntos.
sentences.english: Shakira and maluma are going to record a new album together.

sentences.spanish: Di que tus amigos no irán a la playa porque van a tener una reunión familiar.
sentences.english: My friends will not go to the beach because they will have a family gathering.

sentences.spanish: Di que iras al banco temprano porque vas a pagar tu tarjeta de crédito.
sentences.english: I will go to the bank early because I am going to pay my credit card.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que no va a creer esto.
sentences.english: You are not going to believe this.

sentences.spanish: Di que tu papá solía ir de pesca contigo los fines de semana.
sentences.english: My dad used to go fishing with me on weekends.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo si solía beber mucho.
sentences.english: Did you used to drink a lot?.

sentences.spanish: Di que solías trabajar en una empresa internacional.
sentences.english: I used to work in an international company.

sentences.spanish: Di que tu jefe no solía viajar en avión.
sentences.english: My boss didn't used to travel by plane.

sentences.spanish: Di que tu departamento solía tener las ventas más altas.
sentences.english: My department used to have the highest sales.

sentences.spanish: Di que no solíamos descansar los domingos.
sentences.english: We used to not rest on sundays.

sentences.spanish: Di que mucha gente solía esperar el lanzamiento de los nuevos productos de la compañía.
sentences.english: Many people used to look forward to the launch of the company’s new products.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si el gerente solía ayudar a los trabajadores.
sentences.english: Did the manager used to help the workers?

sentences.spanish: Di que los clientes solían regresar.
sentences.english: Customers used to come back.

sentences.spanish: Di que solías comprar los productos de la compañía porqué eran buenos
sentences.english: I used to buy the company’s products because they were good.

sentences.spanish: Di que el gobierno tiene que fomentar el deporte.
sentences.english: The government has to encourage sport.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo que va a tomar para el desayuno.
sentences.english: What are you going to have for breakfast?

sentences.spanish: Di que tus amigos tienen un departamento en Miami.
sentences.english: My friends have an apartment in Miami.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo si tiene que ir a esa fiesta.
sentences.english: Do you have to go to that party?

sentences.spanish: Di que pasaste un momento increíble el verano pasado en Londres.
sentences.english: I had an amazing time last summer in London.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo si tuvo que pararse de puntitas para alcanzar el frasco.
sentences.english: Did you have to stand on tiptoes to reach the jar?

sentences.spanish: Di que contratarás una persona para la recepción porque no tienes suficiente personal.
sentences.english: I will hire a person for the reception because I do not have enough staff.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que debe tomar su medicina como recomendó el doctor.
sentences.english: You should take the medicine as the doctor recommended.

sentences.spanish: Di que tus hijos pasarán un extraordinario verano en el campamento.
sentences.english: My children will spend an extraordinary summer in the camp.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si el amigo del Sr. Smith tiene una sucursal en Puebla.
sentences.english: Does the Mr. Smith’s friend have a branch in Puebla?

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si hemos estudiado suficiente para el exámen.
sentences.english: Have we studied enough for the exam?

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo si alguna vez ha viajado en un crucero.
sentences.english: Have you ever traveled on a cruise?

sentences.spanish: Di que tu hermano ha intentado vencerte jugando Monopoli pero no lo ha conseguido.
sentences.english: My brother has tried to beat me playing Monopoly but he has not succeded.

sentences.spanish: Di que Silvester Stallone ha actuado en muchas películas desde que era jóven. 5 . Di que Maluma lanzó su primer álbum en el 2004 y ha grabado discos con muchos artistas internacionales desde entonces.
sentences.english: Silvester Stallone has acted in many movies since he was young.

sentences.spanish: Di que Suzzane Collins ha escrito algunos libros maravillosos como Los Juegos del Hambre.
sentences.english: Maluma released his first album in 2004 and has recorded albums with many international artists since then.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta por qué los humanos no han entendido que la naturaleza es lo más importante en la tierra.
sentences.english: Suzzane Collins has written some wonderful books like The Hunger Games.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta qué has hecho con tu vida.
sentences.english: Why haven’t humans understood that nature is the most important thing on earth?

sentences.spanish: Di que no has olvidado tu primer beso.
sentences.english: What have I done with my life?

sentences.spanish: Di que ha pasado miles de veces.
sentences.english: I haven’t forgotten my first kiss.

sentences.spanish: Di que los trabajadores ya han manejado ese tipo de producto antes y saben que es peligroso.
sentences.english: The workers have handled this type of product before and know that it's dangerous.

sentences.spanish: Di que han disminuido la calidad de este producto, ya no dura lo mismo.
sentences.english: The quality of this product has decreased, it doesn't last as long anymore.

sentences.spanish: Di que las llantas de tu carro se han gastado, pero todavía no puedes comprar las nuevas.
sentences.english: The tires on my car have worn out, but I still can't afford to buy new ones.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si ellos también han manejado este tipo de producto.
sentences.english: Have they also handled this type of product?

sentences.spanish: Di que aquel pésimo producto ya ha dañado el nombre de la compañía.
sentences.english: That terrible product has already damaged the company's reputation.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si la nueva serie de Netflix también durará 3 temporadas.
sentences.english: Will the new Netflix series also last for 3 seasons?

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo si ya ha manejado ese auto deportivo.
sentences.english: Have you ever driven that sports car?

sentences.spanish: Di que el Sr. Slim todavía maneja el 80 por ciento de las telecomunicaciones en México.
sentences.english: Mr. Slim still controls 80 percent of the telecommunications in Mexico.

sentences.spanish: Di que ya has trabajado en restaurantes antes y por eso sabes como manejar las finanzas y las existencias.
sentences.english: I have worked in restaurants before, so I know how to handle finances and inventory.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si la Sra. Jobs todavía tiene acciones en Apple o ya las ha vendido.
sentences.english: Does Mrs. Jobs still have shares in Apple, or has she already sold them?

sentences.spanish: Di que has aprendido muchas cosas nuevas desde que te inscribiste a Know How.
sentences.english: I have learned many new things since I enrolled in Know How.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo cual es la película más terrorífica que ha visto alguna vez?
sentences.english: What's the scariest movie you've ever seen?

sentences.spanish: Di que la película animada “Up” es acerca de un anciano que ha vivido en la misma casa vieja por más de 40 años.
sentences.english: The animated movie "Up" is about an old man who has lived in the same old house for over 40 years.

sentences.spanish: Di que has visto películas independientes por más de 10 años y te encantan.
sentences.english: I have been watching independent movies for over 10 years, and I love them.

sentences.spanish: Di que Steven Spielberg ha estado preparando el lanzamiento de la 3er película “Gremlins” por 10 años. Finalmente Gremlins 3 será lanzada a finales de 2018.
sentences.english: Steven Spielberg has been preparing the release of the 3rd "Gremlins" movie for 10 years. Finally, Gremlins 3 will be released in late 2018.

sentences.spanish: Di que Alejandro Gonzalez Iñarritu ganó un Oscar como mejor director con la película “Birdman” pero no ha ganado otro Oscar como mejor director desde entonces.
sentences.english: Alejandro Gonzalez Iñarritu won an Oscar for Best Director with the movie "Birdman," but he hasn't won another Oscar for Best Director since then.

sentences.spanish: Di que Steven Spielberg comenzó su carrera como director hace 3 décadas. Di que ha dirigido muchas películas taquilleras desde entonces.
sentences.english: Steven Spielberg started his directing career three decades ago. He has directed many blockbuster films since then.

sentences.spanish: Di que Rachel McAdams ha estelarizado algunas películas cursis y ha ganado un Oscar como mejor actriz de reparto por su papel en la película “Spotlight”.
sentences.english: Rachel McAdams has starred in some romantic movies and won an Oscar for Best Supporting Actress for her role in the movie "Spotlight."

sentences.spanish: Di que “Juego Macabro” comenzó como una película de bajo presupuesto pero se ha vuelto una de las mejores películas de terror de todos los tiempos.
sentences.english: "Saw" started as a low-budget movie but has become one of the best horror movies of all time.

sentences.spanish: Di que Jared Letto ha interpretado diferentes personajes en el cine desde su inicio en 1995 en la película “How to Make and American Quilt” donde interpretó a un joven enamorado. Ha sido nominado para varios premios de la academia y gano un Oscar como mejor actor de reparto por la película “Dallas Buyers Club” donde interpreta a un Transgenero.
sentences.english: Jared Leto has portrayed different characters in films since his debut in 1995 in the movie "How to Make an American Quilt," where he played a young lover. He has been nominated for several Academy Awards and won an Oscar for Best Supporting Actor in the movie "Dallas Buyers Club," where he portrayed a transgender character.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si en 50 años los matrimonios entre humanos y maquinas habrán sido legalizados.
sentences.english: Will marriages between humans and machines be legalized in 50 years?

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si el amor hacía las personas será reemplazado por el amor hacía las máquinas con la Inteligencia Artificial.
sentences.english: Will love towards machines with Artificial Intelligence replace love towards people?

sentences.spanish: Di que los seres humanos habrán olvidado la vida como la conocemos hoy.
sentences.english: Humans will have forgotten life as we know it today.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si la Inteligencia Artificial habrá sustituido a los humanos en sus empleos en 20 años.
sentences.english: Will Artificial Intelligence have replaced humans in their jobs within 20 years?

sentences.spanish: Di que para entonces las mascotas reales habrán desaparecido y los humanos preferirán tener robots.
sentences.english: By then, real pets will have disappeared, and humans will prefer to have robots.

sentences.spanish: Di que en 20 años los robots habrán ocupado un lugar importante en la vida de los seres humanos.
sentences.english: In 20 years, robots will have played a significant role in the lives of humans.

sentences.spanish: Di que en poco tiempo, la mayoría de las personas habrán tenido algún tipo de interacción con algún robot.
sentences.english: In a short time, the majority of people will have had some kind of interaction with a robot.

sentences.spanish: Di que la Inteligencia Artificial habrá llegado a la mayoría de las personas en menos de 20 años.
sentences.english: Artificial Intelligence will have reached the majority of people in less than 20 years.

sentences.spanish: Di que cuando los humanos se den cuanta, las maquinas habrán tomado el control.
sentences.english: When humans realize it, machines will have taken control.

sentences.spanish: Di que en el futuro las maquinas se habrán vuelto más inteligentes que los seres humanos.
sentences.english: In the future, machines will have become more intelligent than human beings.

sentences.spanish: Di que no ha habido cambios en el estado del paciente.
sentences.english: There have been no changes in the patient's condition.

sentences.spanish: Desde entonces ha habido innumerables actos de violencia en el país
sentences.english: Since then, there have been countless acts of violence in the country.

sentences.spanish: Di que ha habido grandes diferencias de opinión respecto a los candidatos.
sentences.english: There have been significant differences of opinion regarding the candidates.

sentences.spanish: Di que ha habido guerras en Chechenia durante 300 años.
sentences.english: There have been wars in Chechnya for 300 years.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si ha habido un diálogo entre Estados Unidos y Korea del norte respecto a este asunto.
sentences.english: Has there been any dialogue between the United States and North Korea regarding this issue?

sentences.spanish: Di que nunca ha habido un problema en la fábrica desde que tú eres el director.
sentences.english: There has never been a problem at the factory since you became the director.

sentences.spanish: Di que hasta cierto punto ha habido buena comunicación entre ambos equipos.
sentences.english: There has been good communication between both teams to some extent.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si ha habido nuevos alumnos inscritos al curso.
sentences.english: Have there been any new students enrolled in the course?

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si ha habido verdaderos resultados en seguridad últimamente.
sentences.english: Have there been any real results in terms of security lately?

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si ha habido alguien al aire en un programa de televisión por más tiempo que Chabelo.
sentences.english: Has anyone been on the air in a TV show for a longer time than Chabelo?

sentences.spanish: Di que algo debe haber ocurrido.
sentences.english: Something must have happened.

sentences.spanish: Di que Karla debe haber salido, no puedes encontrarla.
sentences.english: Karla must have left; you can't find her.

sentences.spanish: Di que crees que Ronald debe haber caminado desde aquí. Puedes ver sus huellas.
sentences.english: You think Ronald must have walked from here. You can see his footprints.

sentences.spanish: Di que no puedes creer que Susan se ha tatuado, debe haber dolido mucho.
sentences.english: You can't believe that Susan got a tattoo; it must have hurt a lot.

sentences.spanish: Di que los científicos deben haber encontrado algo importante en la cueva, han estado ahí todo el día.
sentences.english: Scientists must have found something important in the cave; they have been there all day.

sentences.spanish: Di que debe haber sido muy difícil para él enfrentar sus problemas.
sentences.english: It must have been very difficult for him to face his problems.

sentences.spanish: Di que debe haber sido un temblor lo que sacudió tu casa esta mañana.
sentences.english: It must have been an earthquake that shook your house this morning.

sentences.spanish: Di que Los Simpson deben haber regresado a Springfield. No se sentían como en casa aquí.
sentences.english: The Simpsons must have returned to Springfield. They didn't feel at home here.

sentences.spanish: Di que debe haber llevado mucho tiempo construir ese puente.
sentences.english: It must have taken a long time to build that bridge.

sentences.spanish: Di que debe haber sido fantástico vivir en el viejo oeste.
sentences.english: It must have been fantastic to live in the Old West.

sentences.spanish: Di que pudiste haber muerto en ese accidente.
sentences.english: I could have died in that accident.

sentences.spanish: Di que ella te pudo haber dicho la verdad.
sentences.english: She could have told you the truth.

sentences.spanish: Di que ella no pudo haber olvidado lo nuestro.
sentences.english: She couldn't have forgotten about us.

sentences.spanish: Di que ese carro pudo haber sido tuyo.
sentences.english: That car could have been yours.

sentences.spanish: Di que pudiste haber entrado a esa universidad.
sentences.english: You could have gotten into that university.

sentences.spanish: Di que no pudo haber sido mejor.
sentences.english: It couldn't have been better.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que pudo haber comprado un celular mejor que este.
sentences.english: Tell the person with you that they could have bought a better cellphone than this.

sentences.spanish: Di que fuiste disfrazado así que no pudieron haberte visto.
sentences.english: I was disguised, so they couldn't have seen me.

sentences.spanish: Di que Blockbuster pudo haber sido comprado por Netflix, pero decidió seguir como estaba.
sentences.english: Blockbuster could have been bought by Netflix, but they decided to stay as they were.

sentences.spanish: Di que la guerra pudo haber terminado si el ejército alemán se hubiera rendido antes.
sentences.english: The war could have ended if the German army had surrendered earlier.

sentences.spanish: Di que la lluvia torrencial podría causar que el río inunde la ciudad.
sentences.english: The torrential rain could cause the river to flood the city.

sentences.spanish: Di que el teléfono de la persona contigo podría estar en la sala.
sentences.english: The person with you might have their phone in the living room.

sentences.spanish: Di que podríamos quedarnos en casa y ver una película o podríamos salir a cenar.
sentences.english: We could stay at home and watch a movie or go out for dinner.

sentences.spanish: Di que podrías ir con él pero tienes que estudiar.
sentences.english: You could go with him, but you have to study.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si podrías usar la computadora de la persona contigo para enviar un correo  electrónico a tu jefe.
sentences.english: Could I use the person's computer with you to send an email to my boss?

sentences.spanish: Di que ella podría estar muerta, necesitamos encontrarla.
sentences.english: She could be dead; we need to find her.

sentences.spanish: Di que podrías visitar a tu hermano cada fin de semana en Puebla pero no tienes tanto dinero.
sentences.english: You could visit your brother every weekend in Puebla, but you don't have that much money.

sentences.spanish: Di que podrías ganar la lotería.
sentences.english: You could win the lottery.

sentences.spanish: Di que no podrías ver el sol fijamente por más de 3 segundos sin tus eagle eyes.
sentences.english: You couldn't stare directly at the sun for more than 3 seconds without your eagle eyes.

sentences.spanish: Di que podría ser.
sentences.english: It could be.

sentences.spanish: Di que podría haber una oportunidad para las personas contigo en tu compañía.
sentences.english: There could be an opportunity for the people with you in your company.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que debería ponerse un impermeable porque esta lloviendo.
sentences.english: You should wear a raincoat because it's raining.

sentences.spanish: Di que el policía nos detuvo y nos dijo que deberíamos manejar más despacio.
sentences.english: The police officer stopped us and told us that we should drive slower.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que no debería comer tanta comida chatarra.
sentences.english: You shouldn't eat so much junk food.

sentences.spanish: Di que la mercancía china que compraste en linea debería llegar la próxima semana.
sentences.english: The Chinese merchandise you bought online should arrive next week.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que si ya ha leído “Los Juegos del Hambre” debería ver la película.
sentences.english: If the person with you has already read "The Hunger Games," they should watch the movie.

sentences.spanish: Di que todos los empleados de esta compañía deberían tomar un curso de atención al cliente.
sentences.english: All employees in this company should take a customer service course.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si los padres deberían dejar a sus hijos usar el celular todo el tiempo.
sentences.english: Should parents let their children use their phones all the time?

sentences.spanish: Di que el maestro te dijo que deberías estudiar más.
sentences.english: The teacher told me that I should study more.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo si podría recomendarte una pastilla o deberías ir al doctor.
sentences.english: Could the person with you recommend a pill or should I go to the doctor?

sentences.spanish: Di que el siguiente mes deberías tener suficiente dinero para comprar un carro.
sentences.english: I should have enough money next month to buy a car.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si ellos no deberían estar en la escuela en lugar de estar jugando vídeo juegos.
sentences.english: Shouldn't they be in school instead of playing video games?

sentences.spanish: Di que es muy tarde y ese niño no debería estar sólo en la calle.
sentences.english: It's very late, and that child shouldn't be alone on the street.

sentences.spanish: Di que ellos deberían haberte ayudado a decorar el departamento pero prefirieron ir a una fiesta y tuviste que hacerlo tú sólo.
sentences.english: They should have helped you decorate the apartment, but they preferred to go to a party, so you had to do it alone.

sentences.spanish: Di que sus padres no los dejan jugar sí ellos no terminan su tarea.
sentences.english: Their parents don't let them play if they don't finish their homework.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta que pasa si no abrimos la tienda a tiempo.
sentences.english: What happens if we don't open the store on time?

sentences.spanish: Di que cuando un concursante gana, le damos un premio y un reconocimiento.
sentences.english: When a contestant wins, we give them a prize and recognition.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que sí estudia diseño gráfico, necesita comprar una computadora más rápida.
sentences.english: If the person with you is studying graphic design, they need to buy a faster computer.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta que pasa cuando el amor acaba.
sentences.english: What happens when love ends?

sentences.spanish: Di que sí estudiamos todos los días, los exámenes no son difíciles.
sentences.english: If we study every day, the exams are not difficult.

sentences.spanish: Di que sí un hombre se deja llevar por la ira, puede cometer un error fatal.
sentences.english: If a man lets anger control him, he can make a fatal mistake.

sentences.spanish: Di que no necesitamos dinero si tenemos amor.
sentences.english: We don't need money if we have love.

sentences.spanish: Di que sí ellos hacen lo que les ordenas, no tienen porque estar preocupados.
sentences.english: If they do as you tell them, they shouldn't be worried.

sentences.spanish: Di que la gente tiene mejores oportunidades cuando el gobierno fomenta el emprendimiento.
sentences.english: People have better opportunities when the government encourages entrepreneurship.

sentences.spanish: Di que sí los Dodgers pierden contra las Medias Rojas, los Yankees serán campeones de la temporada.
sentences.english: If the Dodgers lose against the Red Sox, the Yankees will be the champions of the season.

sentences.spanish: Di que la gente se volverá loca si México gana la copa del mundo.
sentences.english: People will go crazy if Mexico wins the World Cup.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si engordaras si comes pizza todos los días.
sentences.english: Would you gain weight if you eat pizza every day?

sentences.spanish: Di que sí estudias Inglés, te contrataran en alguna empresa internacional.
sentences.english: If you study English, you will be hired by an international company.

sentences.spanish: Di que los inversionistas no se irán del país si AMLO es presidente.
sentences.english: Investors will not leave the country if AMLO becomes president.

sentences.spanish: Di que sí la gente sigue usando bolsas de plástico y popotes, la naturaleza pagará las consecuencias.
sentences.english: If people continue to use plastic bags and straws, nature will suffer the consequences.

sentences.spanish: Di que sí sigues así, pronto terminarás tu curso de Ingles.
sentences.english: If you keep going like this, you will soon finish your English course.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que sí ahorra, pronto podrá ir de vacaciones a cualquier lugar que desee.
sentences.english: If you save, you will soon be able to go on vacation anywhere you want.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que se enfermará si no usa chamarra.
sentences.english: The person with you will get sick if they don't wear a jacket.

sentences.spanish: Di que estarás dejando el hotel a las 3 pm si tú vuelo es a las 5.
sentences.english: I will be checking out of the hotel at 3 pm if my flight is at 5.

sentences.spanish: Di que si tú fueras el, no comprarías un celular tan caro.
sentences.english: If I were you, I wouldn't buy such an expensive cellphone.

sentences.spanish: Di que si ganaras la lotería, viajarías por el mundo.
sentences.english: If I won the lottery, I would travel the world.

sentences.spanish: Di que los niños no odiarían la escuela si fuera divertida.
sentences.english: Kids wouldn't hate school if it was fun.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta a la persona contigo por qué aún si tuviese la oportunidad de estudiar en Londres lo haría en los Estados Unidos.
sentences.english: Why would you choose to study in the United States instead of taking the opportunity to study in London?

sentences.spanish: Di que si ella tuviera los documentos, ya los habría mostrado al juez.
sentences.english: If she had the documents, she would have already shown them to the judge.

sentences.spanish: Di que si tu médico te dijera que tienes 2 meses de vida, pasarías el tiempo con tus seres queridos.
sentences.english: If my doctor told me I had two months to live, I would spend time with my loved ones.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo qué animal le gustaría ser si fuera uno.
sentences.english: What animal would you like to be if you were one?

sentences.spanish: Di que si tuvieras super poderes, tal vez podrías volar.
sentences.english: If I had superpowers, maybe I could fly.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo a dónde le gustaría ir las próximas vacaciones si tuviera dinero suficiente.
sentences.english: Where would you like to go on your next vacation if you had enough money?

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo qué haría si terminara su curso de inglés hoy.
sentences.english: What would you do if you finished your English course today?

sentences.spanish: Di que si hubieras llegado a tiempo a la entrevista de trabajo, te habrían contratado.
sentences.english: If you had arrived on time to the job interview, they would have hired you.

sentences.spanish: Di que si hubieras sabido que ella vendría, te hubieras puesto otra camisa.
sentences.english: If you had known that she was coming, you would have worn a different shirt.

sentences.spanish: Di que tu novio(a) no se habría enojado si no hubieras olvidado su aniversario.
sentences.english: Your boyfriend/girlfriend wouldn't have gotten mad if you hadn't forgotten your anniversary.

sentences.spanish: Di que hubieras pedido el pastel de coco si no hubiera tenido pasas.
sentences.english: You would have ordered the coconut cake if it hadn't had raisins.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si ellos habrían podido terminar la obra si hubieran tenido mas tiempo.
sentences.english: Would they have been able to finish the project if they had more time?

sentences.spanish: Di que no habrías nacido si tus padres no se hubieran conocido.
sentences.english: You wouldn't have been born if your parents hadn't met.

sentences.spanish: Di que si tuvieras mas tiempo lo pasarías con tu familia.
sentences.english: If you had more time, you would spend it with your family.

sentences.spanish: Di que no te habrías enojado tanto si él te hubiera dicho la verdad.
sentences.english: You wouldn't have gotten so angry if he had told you the truth.

sentences.spanish: Di que no hubiéramos terminado si no te hubieras ido a Nueva York.
sentences.english: We wouldn't have broken up if you hadn't gone to New York.

sentences.spanish: Di que Brasil podría haber ganado la copa del mundo en Rusia si Bélgica no lo hubiera derrotado.
sentences.english: Brazil could have won the World Cup in Russia if Belgium hadn't defeated them.

sentences.spanish: Di que si quieres ganar más dinero debes buscar un trabajo en el extranjero.
sentences.english: If you want to earn more money, you should look for a job abroad.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo que haría si tuviera un millón de dolares.
sentences.english: Ask the person with you what they would do if they had a million dollars.

sentences.spanish: Di que si ganases la lotería, viajarías por el mundo.
sentences.english: If you won the lottery, you would travel the world.

sentences.spanish: Di que si ellos no hubieran bebido, no habrían tenido ese fatal accidente.
sentences.english: If they hadn't been drinking, they wouldn't have had that fatal accident.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo que haría si alguien lo asaltara.
sentences.english: Ask the person with you what they would do if someone mugged them.

sentences.spanish: Di que si ella hubiera hablado contigo, la habrías escuchado y le habrias dado un buen 7. consejo.
sentences.english: If she had talked to you, you would have listened to her and given her good advice.

sentences.spanish: Di que si queremos trabajar más rápido necesitaremos una computadora mas nueva.
sentences.english: If we want to work faster, we'll need a newer computer.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo si le prestaría dinero a Mike, Dile que recuerde que no le pago la última vez.
sentences.english: Ask the person with you if they would lend money to Mike, and remind them that he didn't pay them back last time.

sentences.spanish: Di que el cemento translúcido fue lanzado hace un par de años por una compañía mexicana.
sentences.english: Translucent cement was launched a couple of years ago by a Mexican company.

sentences.spanish: Di que John debería ser promovido el siguiente año ya que fue el mejor trabajador durante este.
sentences.english: John should be promoted next year as he was the best worker during this year.

sentences.spanish: Di que la cura contra el cáncer no ha sido descubierta aún, sin embargo, los científicos continúan buscándola.
sentences.english: The cure for cancer has not been discovered yet; however, scientists continue to search for it.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta por quién fue escrita la Iliada.
sentences.english: Who was the Iliad written by?

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si los gobernadores corruptos serán encarcelados por la justicia.
sentences.english: Will corrupt governors be imprisoned by the justice system?

sentences.spanish: Di que Mary no vino a la fiesta porque no fue invitada.
sentences.english: Mary didn't come to the party because she wasn't invited.

sentences.spanish: Di que los niños están emocionados porque serán llevados al zoologico.
sentences.english: The children are excited because they will be taken to the zoo.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta porque la mayoría de las estrellas odian ser fotografiados por los paparazzis.
sentences.english: Why do most celebrities hate being photographed by paparazzi?

sentences.spanish: Pregunta cuantos niños nacen al día en este hospital.
sentences.english: How many children are born each day in this hospital?

sentences.spanish: Di que Javier Duarte va a ser juzgado el año entrante y es posible que sea encarcelado.
sentences.english: Javier Duarte will be tried next year, and it's possible that he will be imprisoned.

sentences.spanish: Di que no puedes encontrar tu nombre en la lista pero seguiras buscando.
sentences.english: I can't find my name on the list, but I will keep searching.

sentences.spanish: Di que te pondrás en contacto con el ingeniero en Minnesota.
sentences.english: I will get in touch with the engineer in Minnesota.

sentences.spanish: Di que todavía no has encontrado a la persona que estás buscando.
sentences.english: I still haven't found the person I'm looking for.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta porque esos niños excluyeron a Sophie del juego.
sentences.english: Why did those children exclude Sophie from the game?

sentences.spanish: Di que David y Martha adelantaron su boda porque la mayoría de sus amigos no podían asistir en diciembre.
sentences.english: David and Martha moved up their wedding because most of their friends couldn't attend in December.

sentences.spanish: Di que tu carro necesita arreglo.
sentences.english: My car needs repairs.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo si no piensa dejar de fumar.
sentences.english: Don't you plan on quitting smoking?

sentences.spanish: Di que esas personas necesitan detenerse a pensar en sus acciones.
sentences.english: Those people need to stop and think about their actions.

sentences.spanish: Di que ella no pudo evitar enamorarse de él.
sentences.english: She couldn't help but fall in love with him.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que necesita caminar dos cuadras más en esta misma calle para llegar al parque central.
sentences.english: You need to walk two more blocks on this same street to reach the central park.

sentences.spanish: Di que sabes que ella no quiso decir eso pero te hirió de cualquier forma.
sentences.english: I know she didn't mean to say that, but it hurt me anyway.

sentences.spanish: Di que para ti una infidelidad significa decir adiós.
sentences.english: To me, infidelity means saying goodbye.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo si quiere seguir viviendo así.
sentences.english: Do you want to continue living like this?

sentences.spanish: Di que después de la junta pasaremos a tomar unos tragos.
sentences.english: After the meeting, we'll go grab some drinks.

sentences.spanish: Di que ya hablaste con él pero él continúa creyendo otra cosa.
sentences.english: I already spoke to him, but he still believes something else.

sentences.spanish: Di que leer ese libro cambió tu vida.
sentences.english: That book changed my life.

sentences.spanish: Di que está lloviendo.
sentences.english: It 's raining.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si las clases de manejo pueden ser el domingo.
sentences.english: Can the driving lesson be on Sunday?

sentences.spanish: Di que no te gusta nadar solo.
sentences.english: I don’t like swimming alone.

sentences.spanish: Di que el cuarto de lectura es un lugar muy tranquilo.
sentences.english: The reading room is a very peaceful place.

sentences.spanish: Di que Mary está hablando con su jefe.
sentences.english: Mary is talking to her boss.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que no te mienta.
sentences.english: Don’t lie to me.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que camine hacia el norte sobre la 5ta avenida.
sentences.english: Walk to the north on Fifth Avenue.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que gire a la derecha en la esquina de la calle Arlington.
sentences.english: Turn right on the corner of Arlington Street.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que camine 100 metros en la calle Arlington y que encontrará un Mcdonald 's.
sentences.english: Walk straight 100 meters on Arlington Road and you will find a Macdonald’s on the left.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que pida una hamburguesa con queso y papas y que te las traiga.
sentences.english: Ask for a cheese burger and chips and bring them to me.

sentences.spanish: Di que el insistió en que Peter se fuera inmediatamente,
sentences.english: He insisted that Peter leave immediately.

sentences.spanish: Di que Janet convenció a Danielle de que la llevara al aeropuerto.
sentences.english: Janet convinced Danielle to take me to the airport.

sentences.spanish: Di que Gary le esta poniendo el estéreo a tu carro en su garage.
sentences.english: Gary is installing the stereo in my car in his garage.

sentences.spanish: Di que ella le pidió a su hermana traducir el artículo.
sentences.english: She asked her sister to translate the article for me.

sentences.spanish: Di que finalmente convenciste a tu arrendador de cambiar la chapa.
sentences.english: I finally convinced my landlord to change the lock.

sentences.spanish: Di que tu mamá insistió en que usarás ese vestido para la fiesta.
sentences.english: My mom insisted that I wear that dress to the party.

sentences.spanish: Di que le pedirás a John que te recoja en la estación.
sentences.english: I will ask John to pick me up at the station.

sentences.spanish: Di que ella te pidió comprar algunas botanas para la reunión.
sentences.english: She asked me to buy some snacks for the gathering.

sentences.spanish: Di que la policía insistió en que deberíamos quedarnos en casa.
sentences.english: The police insisted that we should stay at home.

sentences.spanish: Di que tratarás de convencerlo de que te pague el dinero que te debe.
sentences.english: I will try to convince him to pay me the money he owes.

sentences.spanish: Di que la recepcionista te pidió esperar afuera de su oficina.
sentences.english: The receptionist asked me to wait outside her office.

sentences.spanish: Di que el doctor insistió en que fuéramos ir al hospital.
sentences.english: The doctor insisted that we go to the hospital.

sentences.spanish: Di que deberías hacer ejercicio con regularidad para mantenerte saludable.
sentences.english: You should exercise regularly to stay healthy.

sentences.spanish: Di que los estudiantes deberían prestar más atención en clase para mejorar sus calificaciones.
sentences.english: Students should pay more attention in class to improve their grades.

sentences.spanish: Di que deberíamos ser más conscientes del medio ambiente y reducir nuestro consumo de plástico.
sentences.english: We should be more environmentally conscious and reduce our plastic consumption.

sentences.spanish: Di que los gobiernos deberían invertir más en educación y atención médica.
sentences.english: Governments should invest more in education and healthcare.

sentences.spanish: Di que los conductores deberían respetar los límites de velocidad para evitar accidentes.
sentences.english: Drivers should respect speed limits to avoid accidents.

sentences.spanish: Di que las empresas deberían implementar políticas de trabajo flexibles para mejorar la calidad de vida de sus empleados.
sentences.english: Companies should implement flexible work policies to improve their employees' quality of life.

sentences.spanish: Di que todos deberíamos practicar la empatía y tratar a los demás con amabilidad.
sentences.english: We should all practice empathy and treat others with kindness.

sentences.spanish: Di que los niños deberían ser alentados a leer más para desarrollar su imaginación.
sentences.english: Children should be encouraged to read more to develop their imagination.

sentences.spanish: Di que los ciudadanos deberían ejercer su derecho al voto para participar en la democracia.
sentences.english: Citizens should exercise their right to vote to participate in democracy.

sentences.spanish: Di que deberíamos ahorrar más dinero para tener una mayor estabilidad financiera.
sentences.english: We should save more money to have greater financial stability.

sentences.spanish: Di que es importante mantener una dieta equilibrada y hacer ejercicio regularmente para llevar un estilo de vida saludable.
sentences.english: It's important to maintain a balanced diet and exercise regularly to lead a healthy lifestyle.

sentences.spanish: Di que es esencial establecer metas claras y trabajar duro para alcanzar nuestros objetivos.
sentences.english: It's essential to set clear goals and work hard to achieve our objectives.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos aprender de nuestros errores y usarlos como oportunidades para crecer.
sentences.english: We should learn from our mistakes and use them as opportunities for growth.

sentences.spanish: Di que es fundamental mantener una actitud positiva y optimista ante los desafíos de la vida.
sentences.english: It's crucial to maintain a positive and optimistic attitude in the face of life's challenges.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos practicar la gratitud y apreciar las cosas buenas que tenemos en nuestras vidas.
sentences.english: We should practice gratitude and appreciate the good things we have in our lives.

sentences.spanish: Di que es importante respetar las diferencias entre las personas y promover la inclusión y la diversidad.
sentences.english: It's important to respect the differences between people and promote inclusion and diversity.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos cuidar el medio ambiente y adoptar prácticas sostenibles para proteger el planeta.
sentences.english: We should take care of the environment and adopt sustainable practices to protect the planet.

sentences.spanish: Di que es esencial ser empáticos y comprensivos con los demás, mostrando empatía hacia sus sentimientos y experiencias.
sentences.english: Being empathetic and understanding with others, showing empathy towards their feelings and experiences, is essential.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos ser responsables y asumir las consecuencias de nuestras acciones.
sentences.english: We should be responsible and take the consequences of our actions.

sentences.spanish: Di que es importante mantener una comunicación abierta y honesta en nuestras relaciones personales y profesionales..
sentences.english: It's important to maintain open and honest communication in our personal and professional relationships.

sentences.spanish: Di que la educación es la clave para el desarrollo personal y el progreso de una sociedad.
sentences.english: Education is the key to personal development and the progress of society.

sentences.spanish: Di que es importante cultivar la creatividad y buscar soluciones innovadoras a los problemas que enfrentamos.
sentences.english: It's important to cultivate creativity and seek innovative solutions to the problems we face.

sentences.spanish: Di que el respeto es fundamental en todas las interacciones humanas y debe ser practicado en todo momento.
sentences.english: Respect is fundamental in all human interactions and should be practiced at all times.

sentences.spanish: Di que el trabajo en equipo es esencial para lograr objetivos más grandes y complejos.
sentences.english: Teamwork is essential to achieve larger and more complex goals.

sentences.spanish: Di que es importante mantenerse informado y cuestionar la información que recibimos para tener una visión más completa y precisa del mundo.
sentences.english: It's important to stay informed and question the information we receive to have a more comprehensive and accurate view of the world.

sentences.spanish: Di que la perseverancia y la paciencia son cualidades importantes para superar obstáculos y alcanzar el éxito.
sentences.english: Perseverance and patience are important qualities to overcome obstacles and achieve success.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos fomentar la igualdad de oportunidades para todas las personas, independientemente de su género, raza, o condición socioeconómica.
sentences.english: We should promote equal opportunities for all people, regardless of their gender, race, or socioeconomic status.

sentences.spanish: Di que la honestidad y la integridad son valores fundamentales que deben guiar nuestras acciones y decisiones.
sentences.english: Honesty and integrity are fundamental values that should guide our actions and decisions.

sentences.spanish: Di que el aprendizaje continuo es esencial para mantenernos actualizados y adaptarnos a un mundo en constante cambio.
sentences.english: Continuous learning is essential to stay updated and adapt to a constantly changing world.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos practicar el autocuidado y dedicar tiempo para nuestro bienestar físico y emocional.
sentences.english: We should practice self-care and dedicate time to our physical and emotional well-being.

sentences.spanish: Di que es importante practicar la empatía y ponerse en el lugar de los demás para comprender sus sentimientos y perspectivas.
sentences.english: It's important to practice empathy and put ourselves in the shoes of others to understand their feelings and perspectives.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos aprender a manejar el estrés y buscar formas saludables de lidiar con la presión diaria.
sentences.english: We should learn to manage stress and seek healthy ways to cope with daily pressure.

sentences.spanish: Di que es esencial ser agradecidos por las pequeñas cosas y no dar por sentado lo que tenemos.
sentences.english: Being grateful for the little things and not taking what we have for granted is essential.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos ser conscientes de nuestro impacto en el medio ambiente y tomar medidas para reducir nuestra huella ecológica.
sentences.english: We must be conscious of our impact on the environment and take steps to reduce our ecological footprint.

sentences.spanish: Di que la honestidad y la transparencia en nuestras acciones fomentan la confianza en las relaciones personales y profesionales.
sentences.english: Honesty and transparency in our actions foster trust in personal and professional relationships.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos buscar oportunidades de crecimiento personal y profesional para seguir desarrollándonos.
sentences.english: We should seek opportunities for personal and professional growth to keep evolving.

sentences.spanish: Di que el perdón es una muestra de madurez emocional y liberación del rencor.
sentences.english: Forgiveness is a display of emotional maturity and a release from resentment.

sentences.spanish: Di que es importante establecer límites saludables en nuestras relaciones para proteger nuestra salud emocional.
sentences.english: Establishing healthy boundaries in our relationships is important to protect our emotional well-being.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos valorar y cuidar nuestras amistades, ya que son pilares importantes en nuestra vida.
sentences.english: We should value and nurture our friendships as they are important pillars in our lives.

sentences.spanish: Di que el pensamiento positivo y la actitud proactiva nos ayudan a enfrentar los desafíos con mayor determinación.
sentences.english: Positive thinking and a proactive attitude help us face challenges with greater determination.

sentences.spanish: Di que es esencial ser responsables con nuestras finanzas y aprender a administrar nuestro dinero de manera inteligente.
sentences.english: It's essential to be responsible with our finances and learn to manage our money smartly.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos ser humildes y reconocer que siempre hay más por aprender y mejorar.
sentences.english: We should be humble and acknowledge that there is always more to learn and improve.

sentences.spanish: Di que es importante practicar la autoaceptación y valorar nuestra propia valía, independientemente de las opiniones de los demás.
sentences.english: Practicing self-acceptance and valuing our worth, regardless of others' opinions, is important.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos ser proactivos y tomar la iniciativa en la búsqueda de nuestras metas y sueños.
sentences.english: We should be proactive and take the initiative in pursuing our goals and dreams.

sentences.spanish: Di que es fundamental ser respetuosos con las diferencias culturales y aprender a convivir en una sociedad diversa.
sentences.english: Respect for cultural differences and learning to coexist in a diverse society is fundamental.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos cultivar una mentalidad de crecimiento y ver los errores como oportunidades de aprendizaje.
sentences.english: Cultivating a growth mindset and viewing mistakes as learning opportunities is necessary.

sentences.spanish: Di que es importante ser compasivos y brindar apoyo a aquellos que enfrentan dificultades.
sentences.english: It's important to be compassionate and provide support to those facing difficulties.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos practicar la escucha activa y prestar atención genuina a lo que otros tienen que decir.
sentences.english: Active listening and genuine attention to what others have to say should be practiced.

sentences.spanish: Di que es esencial mantener una actitud de gratitud y reconocer las cosas buenas que nos rodean.
sentences.english: Maintaining an attitude of gratitude and recognizing the good things around us is essential.

sentences.spanish: Di que debemos ser conscientes de nuestro tiempo y dedicarlo a actividades que nos aporten valor y satisfacción.
sentences.english: Being mindful of our time and dedicating it to activities that bring us value and satisfaction is crucial.

sentences.spanish: Di que estarás en casa a las 5 pm.
sentences.english: I will be home at 5 pm.

sentences.spanish: Di que no podrás asistir a la reunión porque estás enfermo/a.
sentences.english: I won't be able to attend the meeting because I'm sick.

sentences.spanish: Di que tendrás que postergar el viaje debido a un problema inesperado.
sentences.english: I will have to postpone the trip due to an unexpected issue.

sentences.spanish: Di que irás al concierto el próximo fin de semana.
sentences.english: I will go to the concert next weekend.

sentences.spanish: Di que no estarás disponible para la llamada hasta mañana.
sentences.english: I won't be available for the call until tomorrow.

sentences.spanish: Di que estarás ocupado/a todo el día.
sentences.english: I will be busy all day.

sentences.spanish: Di que estarás feliz de ayudar con el proyecto.
sentences.english: I will be happy to help with the project.

sentences.spanish: Di que estarás en la oficina a primera hora de la mañana.
sentences.english: I will be at the office first thing in the morning.

sentences.spanish: Di que estarás esperándolos en el restaurante a las 7 pm.
sentences.english: I will be waiting for them at the restaurant at 7 pm.

sentences.spanish: Di que estarás encantado/a de conocer a su equipo.
sentences.english: I will be delighted to meet their team.

sentences.spanish: Di que cuando llegaste a casa, tu madre ya había preparado la cena.
sentences.english: When you got home, your mother had already prepared dinner.

sentences.spanish: Di que ya habías visto esa película antes y que te encantó.
sentences.english: You had already seen that movie before, and you loved it.

sentences.spanish: Di que para el momento en que llegaste al parque, todos los boletos ya se habían vendido.
sentences.english: By the time you got to the park, all the tickets had already been sold.

sentences.spanish: Di que el pastel estaba delicioso, pero ya te habías llenado con la cena.
sentences.english: The cake was delicious, but you had already filled up with dinner.

sentences.spanish: Di que cuando saliste a caminar, el sol ya se había puesto.
sentences.english: When you went for a walk, the sun had already set.

sentences.spanish: Di que ya habías terminado tus tareas antes de que llegara la tormenta.
sentences.english: You had already finished your tasks before the storm arrived.

sentences.spanish: Di que para cuando llegaste a la tienda, ya habían cerrado.
sentences.english: By the time you got to the store, they had already closed.

sentences.spanish: Di que ya habías reservado el hotel antes de empezar el viaje.
sentences.english: You had already booked the hotel before starting the trip.

sentences.spanish: Di que el libro ya había sido recomendado por varios amigos.
sentences.english: The book had already been recommended by several friends.

sentences.spanish: Di que ya habías practicado la presentación antes de hacerla frente al público.
sentences.english: You had already practiced the presentation before delivering it to the audience.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si has estado en París antes.
sentences.english: Have you been to Paris before?

sentences.spanish: Di que nunca has probado sushi.
sentences.english: You have never tried sushi.

sentences.spanish: Di que has leído ese libro varias veces y que aún te encanta.
sentences.english: You have read that book several times, and you still love it.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si alguna vez has viajado solo/a.
sentences.english: Have you ever traveled alone?

sentences.spanish: Di que has estado ocupado/a con el trabajo últimamente.
sentences.english: You have been busy with work lately.

sentences.spanish: Di que has conocido a muchas personas interesantes en tus viajes.
sentences.english: You have met many interesting people on your travels.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si alguna vez has intentado escalar una montaña.
sentences.english: Have you ever tried to climb a mountain?

sentences.spanish: Di que has aprendido mucho en tu último año de universidad.
sentences.english: You have learned a lot in your last year of college.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si has tomado clases de baile.
sentences.english: Have you taken dance classes?

sentences.spanish: Di que has estado practicando mucho para el examen.
sentences.english: You have been practicing a lot for the exam.

sentences.spanish: Di que estabas estudiando cuando recibiste la llamada.
sentences.english: You were studying when you received the call.

sentences.spanish: Di que estuviste en la playa todo el fin de semana pasado.
sentences.english: You were at the beach all last weekend.

sentences.spanish: Di que estarás ocupado/a mañana por la mañana.
sentences.english: You will be busy tomorrow morning.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si él estuvo en la fiesta anoche.
sentences.english: Was he at the party last night?

sentences.spanish: Di que has estado esperando esa oportunidad durante mucho tiempo.
sentences.english: You have been waiting for that opportunity for a long time.

sentences.spanish: Di que estuviste pensando en esa decisión durante días.
sentences.english: You were thinking about that decision for days.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si ella ha estado en ese restaurante antes.
sentences.english: Has she been to that restaurant before?

sentences.spanish: Di que estarías dispuesto/a a ayudar en cualquier momento.
sentences.english: You would be willing to help anytime.

sentences.spanish: Di que estuviste enfermo/a la semana pasada.
sentences.english: You were sick last week.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si tus amigos han estado en ese país.
sentences.english: Have your friends been to that country?

sentences.spanish: Di que has estado aprendiendo a tocar la guitarra.
sentences.english: You have been learning to play the guitar.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si ella ha estado trabajando en ese proyecto.
sentences.english: Has she been working on that project?

sentences.spanish: Di que habías estado buscando esa tienda por todas partes.
sentences.english: You had been searching for that store everywhere.

sentences.spanish: Di que has estado practicando yoga durante seis meses.
sentences.english: You have been practicing yoga for six months.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si él ha estado entrenando para la maratón.
sentences.english: Has he been training for the marathon?

sentences.spanish: Di que has estado ahorrando dinero para un viaje.
sentences.english: You have been saving money for a trip.

sentences.spanish: Di que habías estado esperando esa noticia desde hace semanas.
sentences.english: You had been waiting for that news for weeks.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si ellos han estado viviendo en esa ciudad por mucho tiempo.
sentences.english: Have they been living in that city for a long time?

sentences.spanish: Di que has estado pensando en cambiar de carrera.
sentences.english: You have been thinking about changing careers.

sentences.spanish: Di que has estado sintiéndote más feliz últimamente.
sentences.english: You have been feeling happier lately.

sentences.spanish: Di que si tú fueras el, no comprarías un celular tan caro.
sentences.english: If I were you, I wouldn't buy such an expensive cellphone.

sentences.spanish: Di que si ganaras la lotería, viajarías por el mundo.
sentences.english: If I won the lottery, I would travel the world.

sentences.spanish: Di que los niños no odiarían la escuela si fuera divertida.
sentences.english: Kids wouldn't hate school if it was fun.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta a la persona contigo por qué aún si tuviese la oportunidad de estudiar en Londres lo haría en los Estados Unidos.
sentences.english: Why would you choose to study in the United States instead of taking the opportunity to study in London?

sentences.spanish: Di que si ella tuviera los documentos, ya los habría mostrado al juez.
sentences.english: If she had the documents, she would have already shown them to the judge.

sentences.spanish: Di que si tu médico te dijera que tienes 2 meses de vida, pasarías el tiempo con tus seres queridos.
sentences.english: If my doctor told me I had two months to live, I would spend time with my loved ones.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo qué animal le gustaría ser si fuera uno.
sentences.english: What animal would you like to be if you were one?

sentences.spanish: Di que si tuvieras super poderes, tal vez podrías volar.
sentences.english: If I had superpowers, maybe I could fly.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo a dónde le gustaría ir las próximas vacaciones si tuviera dinero suficiente.
sentences.english: Where would you like to go on your next vacation if you had enough money?

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo qué haría si terminara su curso de inglés hoy.
sentences.english: What would you do if you finished your English course today?

sentences.spanish: Di que si hubieras llegado a tiempo a la entrevista de trabajo, te habrían contratado.
sentences.english: If you had arrived on time to the job interview, they would have hired you.

sentences.spanish: Di que si hubieras sabido que ella vendría, te hubieras puesto otra camisa.
sentences.english: If you had known that she was coming, you would have worn a different shirt.

sentences.spanish: Di que tu novio(a) no se habría enojado si no hubieras olvidado su aniversario.
sentences.english: Your boyfriend/girlfriend wouldn't have gotten mad if you hadn't forgotten your anniversary.

sentences.spanish: Di que hubieras pedido el pastel de coco si no hubiera tenido pasas.
sentences.english: You would have ordered the coconut cake if it hadn't had raisins.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si ellos habrían podido terminar la obra si hubieran tenido mas tiempo.
sentences.english: Would they have been able to finish the project if they had more time?

sentences.spanish: Di que no habrías nacido si tus padres no se hubieran conocido.
sentences.english: You wouldn't have been born if your parents hadn't met.

sentences.spanish: Di que si tuvieras mas tiempo lo pasarías con tu familia.
sentences.english: If you had more time, you would spend it with your family.

sentences.spanish: Di que no te habrías enojado tanto si él te hubiera dicho la verdad.
sentences.english: You wouldn't have gotten so angry if he had told you the truth.

sentences.spanish: Di que no hubiéramos terminado si no te hubieras ido a Nueva York.
sentences.english: We wouldn't have broken up if you hadn't gone to New York.

sentences.spanish: Di que Brasil podría haber ganado la copa del mundo en Rusia si Bélgica no lo hubiera derrotado.
sentences.english: Brazil could have won the World Cup in Russia if Belgium hadn't defeated them.

sentences.spanish: Di que si quieres ganar más dinero debes buscar un trabajo en el extranjero.
sentences.english: If you want to earn more money, you should look for a job abroad.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo que haría si tuviera un millón de dolares.
sentences.english: Ask the person with you what they would do if they had a million dollars.

sentences.spanish: Di que si ganases la lotería, viajarías por el mundo.
sentences.english: If you won the lottery, you would travel the world.

sentences.spanish: Di que si ellos no hubieran bebido, no habrían tenido ese fatal accidente.
sentences.english: If they hadn't been drinking, they wouldn't have had that fatal accident.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo que haría si alguien lo asaltara.
sentences.english: Ask the person with you what they would do if someone mugged them.

sentences.spanish: Di que si ella hubiera hablado contigo, la habrías escuchado y le habrias dado un buen 7. consejo.
sentences.english: If she had talked to you, you would have listened to her and given her good advice.

sentences.spanish: Di que si queremos trabajar más rápido necesitaremos una computadora mas nueva.
sentences.english: If we want to work faster, we'll need a newer computer.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo si le prestaría dinero a Mike, Dile que recuerde que no le pago la última vez.
sentences.english: Ask the person with you if they would lend money to Mike, and remind them that he didn't pay them back last time.

sentences.spanish: Di que el cemento translúcido fue lanzado hace un par de años por una compañía mexicana.
sentences.english: Translucent cement was launched a couple of years ago by a Mexican company.

sentences.spanish: Di que John debería ser promovido el siguiente año ya que fue el mejor trabajador durante este.
sentences.english: John should be promoted next year as he was the best worker during this year.

sentences.spanish: Di que la cura contra el cáncer no ha sido descubierta aún, sin embargo, los científicos continúan buscándola.
sentences.english: The cure for cancer has not been discovered yet; however, scientists continue to search for it.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta por quién fue escrita la Iliada.
sentences.english: Who was the Iliad written by?

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si los gobernadores corruptos serán encarcelados por la justicia.
sentences.english: Will corrupt governors be imprisoned by the justice system?

sentences.spanish: Di que Mary no vino a la fiesta porque no fue invitada.
sentences.english: Mary didn't come to the party because she wasn't invited.

sentences.spanish: Di que los niños están emocionados porque serán llevados al zoologico.
sentences.english: The children are excited because they will be taken to the zoo.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta porque la mayoría de las estrellas odian ser fotografiados por los paparazzis.
sentences.english: Why do most celebrities hate being photographed by paparazzi?

sentences.spanish: Pregunta cuantos niños nacen al día en este hospital.
sentences.english: How many children are born each day in this hospital?

sentences.spanish: Di que Javier Duarte va a ser juzgado el año entrante y es posible que sea encarcelado.
sentences.english: Javier Duarte will be tried next year, and it's possible that he will be imprisoned.

sentences.spanish: Di que no puedes encontrar tu nombre en la lista pero seguiras buscando.
sentences.english: I can't find my name on the list, but I will keep searching.

sentences.spanish: Di que te pondrás en contacto con el ingeniero en Minnesota.
sentences.english: I will get in touch with the engineer in Minnesota.

sentences.spanish: Di que todavía no has encontrado a la persona que estás buscando.
sentences.english: I still haven't found the person I'm looking for.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta porque esos niños excluyeron a Sophie del juego.
sentences.english: Why did those children exclude Sophie from the game?

sentences.spanish: Di que David y Martha adelantaron su boda porque la mayoría de sus amigos no podían asistir en diciembre.
sentences.english: David and Martha moved up their wedding because most of their friends couldn't attend in December.

sentences.spanish: Di que tu carro necesita arreglo.
sentences.english: My car needs repairs.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo si no piensa dejar de fumar.
sentences.english: Don't you plan on quitting smoking?

sentences.spanish: Di que esas personas necesitan detenerse a pensar en sus acciones.
sentences.english: Those people need to stop and think about their actions.

sentences.spanish: Di que ella no pudo evitar enamorarse de él.
sentences.english: She couldn't help but fall in love with him.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que necesita caminar dos cuadras más en esta misma calle para llegar al parque central.
sentences.english: You need to walk two more blocks on this same street to reach the central park.

sentences.spanish: Di que sabes que ella no quiso decir eso pero te hirió de cualquier forma.
sentences.english: I know she didn't mean to say that, but it hurt me anyway.

sentences.spanish: Di que para ti una infidelidad significa decir adiós.
sentences.english: To me, infidelity means saying goodbye.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona contigo si quiere seguir viviendo así.
sentences.english: Do you want to continue living like this?

sentences.spanish: Di que después de la junta pasaremos a tomar unos tragos.
sentences.english: After the meeting, we'll go grab some drinks.

sentences.spanish: Di que ya hablaste con él pero él continúa creyendo otra cosa.
sentences.english: I already spoke to him, but he still believes something else.

sentences.spanish: Di que leer ese libro cambió tu vida.
sentences.english: That book changed my life.

sentences.spanish: Di que está lloviendo.
sentences.english: It 's raining.

sentences.spanish: Pregunta si las clases de manejo pueden ser el domingo.
sentences.english: Can the driving lesson be on Sunday?

sentences.spanish: Di que no te gusta nadar solo.
sentences.english: I don’t like swimming alone.

sentences.spanish: Di que el cuarto de lectura es un lugar muy tranquilo.
sentences.english: The reading room is a very peaceful place.

sentences.spanish: Di que Mary está hablando con su jefe.
sentences.english: Mary is talking to her boss.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que no te mienta.
sentences.english: Don’t lie to me.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que camine hacia el norte sobre la 5ta avenida.
sentences.english: Walk to the north on Fifth Avenue.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que gire a la derecha en la esquina de la calle Arlington.
sentences.english: Turn right on the corner of Arlington Street.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que camine 100 metros en la calle Arlington y que encontrará un Mcdonald 's.
sentences.english: Walk straight 100 meters on Arlington Road and you will find a Macdonald’s on the left.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona contigo que pida una hamburguesa con queso y papas y que te las traiga.
sentences.english: Ask for a cheese burger and chips and bring them to me.

sentences.spanish: Di que el insistió en que Peter se fuera inmediatamente,
sentences.english: He insisted that Peter leave immediately.

sentences.spanish: Di que Janet convenció a Danielle de que la llevara al aeropuerto.
sentences.english: Janet convinced Danielle to take me to the airport.

sentences.spanish: Di que Gary le esta poniendo el estéreo a tu carro en su garage.
sentences.english: Gary is installing the stereo in my car in his garage.

sentences.spanish: Di que ella le pidió a su hermana traducir el artículo.
sentences.english: She asked her sister to translate the article for me.

sentences.spanish: Di que finalmente convenciste a tu arrendador de cambiar la chapa.
sentences.english: I finally convinced my landlord to change the lock.

sentences.spanish: Di que tu mamá insistió en que usarás ese vestido para la fiesta.
sentences.english: My mom insisted that I wear that dress to the party.

sentences.spanish: Di que le pedirás a John que te recoja en la estación.
sentences.english: I will ask John to pick me up at the station.

sentences.spanish: Di que ella te pidió comprar algunas botanas para la reunión.
sentences.english: She asked me to buy some snacks for the gathering.

sentences.spanish: Di que la policía insistió en que deberíamos quedarnos en casa.
sentences.english: The police insisted that we should stay at home.

sentences.spanish: Di que tratarás de convencerlo de que te pague el dinero que te debe.
sentences.english: I will try to convince him to pay me the money he owes.

sentences.spanish: Di que la recepcionista te pidió esperar afuera de su oficina.
sentences.english: The receptionist asked me to wait outside her office.

sentences.spanish: Di que el doctor insistió en que fuéramos ir al hospital.
sentences.english: The doctor insisted that we go to the hospital.
